scores.notes: OCR output is largely accurate with correct spelling and mostly faithful text reproduction. The distribution list is well preserved with proper names and numbering, though minor punctuation inconsistencies exist (e.g., '3, 4.' instead of '3,4.'). The date received is incorrect ('MAY 19 1984' vs. 'January 19, 1984'), impacting numeric precision. Layout and reading order are well maintained, including section headings and document markings. The 'COPY NO. 11' and 'RESTRICTED' labels are correctly captured. Some minor formatting differences and missing introductory text reduce completeness slightly.
